# ContentCachingInformationResponse

**Device Management Command**

A response from the device after it processes the command to get the status of the content caches on a device.

## Declaration

```swift
object ContentCachingInformationResponse
```

## Objects

- **ContentCachingInformationResponse.ErrorChainItem**: A dictionary that describes an error chain item.
- **ContentCachingInformationResponse.StatusResponse**: A dictionary that contains the status of content caching on a device.

## Commands and responses

- **ContentCachingInformationCommand**: The command to get the status of the content caches on a device.
